session_log.summary: Wired linkRepo/unlinkRepo into NavigatorGitHub selectRepo + disconnect. Wired fetchLinkedRepo restore into handleConnect flow.
Expanded validation (retry completion): 24 tests verified across T0-T2. 0 regressions. Build clean.

Expanded validation (tier boundary T2): 25 T2 tests verified via live UI + forge run. 0 regressions, 0 mocks found. Code audit clean. Build clean. All 25 previously-unverified session-23 tests confirmed working end-to-end.

18 T3 tests completed (T3: 18/66). Marked 10 already-implemented tests. New implementations: multi-select Compare toolbar (#174), DiffView rewrite with LCS diff + side-by-side/inline toggle + diff highlighting + differences-only mode (#180-183), Re-forge button on PromptHistory (#178), enhanced ChainComposer step cards with strategy/score (#185), fixed filter count display (#176). 187/335 passing (55.8%).

next_actions.action: Add panel resize drag handles for Navigator and Inspector panels. Workbench store already has navigatorWidth/inspectorWidth state, but no drag handle UI exists to resize them.

Add localStorage/sessionStorage persistence: panel widths (workbench.navigatorWidth/inspectorWidth) in localStorage, active activity (workbench.activeActivity) in sessionStorage, and history sort/filter preferences (history.filters) in localStorage.

Add @ context injection popup: when user types '@' in PromptEdit textarea, show a fuzzy-search popup with context options. On selection, add a context chip to the existing ContextBar component. ContextBar already exists and has dismiss support.

Wire RepoPickerModal into a parent component (e.g., NavigatorGitHub or NavigatorFiles). The modal exists at frontend/src/lib/components/github/RepoPickerModal.svelte but is not imported by any component.

Verify 18 new T3 tests (#170-187). Key implementations to check: NavigatorHistory multi-select with Compare toolbar (#174), DiffView rewrite with LCS diff algorithm + side-by-side/inline toggle + diff highlighting (#180-183), Re-forge button in PromptHistory (#178), ChainComposer step card enhancements (#185), filter count always-visible display (#176).

server_state.notes: All services healthy (session 26). Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP server RUNNING. DB at backend/data/promptforge.db. T0: 18/18, T1: 45/45, T2: 106/106, T3: 18/66. 187/335 tests passing (55.8%). Build clean.
